# Toku: Workday Stablecoin Payroll Integration Guide - Employee Sync

This is a complete step-by-step guide for setting up your employee sync for Stablecoin Payroll in Workday. 

### Toku Installation Instructions

Please follow these steps in order to establish the connection between Workday and Toku. Employee profiles will be created within Toku after the initial data import.

- **Create Integrated System User**
    
    ### Create your Integrated System User and Integrated System Security Group
    
    1. Create an integrated system user by searching for “Create Integrated System User” task
    in the search box
    
    ![Screenshot 2025-10-16 at 12.18.33 AM.png](Screenshot_2025-10-16_at_12.18.33_AM.png)
    
    1.  Set an appropriate username and password to create the account ([To be shared with us](Toku%20Workday%20Stablecoin%20Payroll%20Integration%20Guide%20%2028d0b95a751d80698f1ee118a199e6cc.md))
        
        ![Screenshot 2025-10-16 at 12.18.57 AM.png](Screenshot_2025-10-16_at_12.18.57_AM.png)
        
    2. Create a security group of type “Integration System Security Group (Unconstrained)” by
    searching for “Create security group” task (Provide a appropriate name)
        
        ![Screenshot 2025-10-16 at 12.20.11 AM.png](Screenshot_2025-10-16_at_12.20.11_AM.png)
        
    3. On the next page about security group details, add your newly created integrated system user (For eg. “TOKU_USER” here) in the Integrated System Users field
        
        ![Screenshot 2025-10-16 at 12.20.42 AM.png](Screenshot_2025-10-16_at_12.20.42_AM.png)
        
    4. After creating the group, click on “Maintain Domain Permissions for Security Group”
    
    ![Screenshot 2025-10-16 at 12.21.13 AM.png](Screenshot_2025-10-16_at_12.21.13_AM.png)
    
    1. On the “Maintain Domain Permissions” page, add the following permissions along with
    any other permissions needed for the custom report generation in the following steps
        
        ![Screenshot 2025-10-16 at 12.23.07 AM.png](Screenshot_2025-10-16_at_12.23.07_AM.png)
        
    2. Final step - After creating and setting up the security group, search for “Activate Pending Security Policy Changes” task and confirm the changes.
        
        ![Screenshot 2025-10-16 at 12.23.54 AM.png](Screenshot_2025-10-16_at_12.23.54_AM.png)
        
- **Create RAAS Reports**
    
    ### Creating Custom Reports with RAAS enabled
    
    Follow the steps below to create RAAS reports within Workday. This will enable you to push the required information needed to onboard employees onto the platform.
    
    1. Search for the “Create Custom Report” task and fill in the details as below. Ensure that
    the report type is “Advanced” and the “Enable as Web Service” is checked. Select the
    appropriate data source
        
        ![Screenshot 2025-10-15 at 11.45.21 PM.png](Screenshot_2025-10-15_at_11.45.21_PM.png)
        
    2. Provide report name as: “**TOKU_EMPLOYEE_DEMOGRAPHICS**” **(Make sure we create the report with this exact name, this will help us interact with it)**
        
        ![Screenshot 2025-10-15 at 11.53.12 PM.png](Screenshot_2025-10-15_at_11.53.12_PM.png)
        
        1. Finally, choose the Data source as “All Active and Terminated Workers” and click on “OK”
        
        ![Screenshot 2025-10-15 at 11.55.09 PM.png](Screenshot_2025-10-15_at_11.55.09_PM.png)
        
        1. You will be greeted with a screen (shared below) and now you can setup the fields in the custom report from the [fields table](Toku%20Workday%20Stablecoin%20Payroll%20Integration%20Guide%20%2028d0b95a751d80698f1ee118a199e6cc.md)
        
        ![Screenshot 2025-10-15 at 11.57.33 PM.png](Screenshot_2025-10-15_at_11.57.33_PM.png)
        
        1. Complete fields list 
            1. Field list needed
                
                ![Screenshot 2025-10-16 at 12.00.50 AM.png](Screenshot_2025-10-16_at_12.00.50_AM.png)
                
            2. Table of fields needed. Required fields are marked with a *.
        
        | **Field** | **Column Heading Override (XML Alias)** |
        | --- | --- |
        | Employee ID* | employeeID |
        | Email - Work* | email |
        | Compensation Range - Currency* | currency |
        | All Home Addresses - Full with Country* | address |
        | Total Pay Annualized - Amount* | totalSalary |
        | Pay Group - Country* | country |
        | Full Legal Name* | fullName |
        | Cost Center - Name | department |
        | Position ID* | positionID |
        | Active Status with Date* | status |
        | Terminated* | terminated |
        | Worker Active* | worker_active |
        | Total Pay - Frequency* | freq |
        | Pay Group | payGroup |
        1. Click on “OK”, once all the fields are added
        2. Add your integrated system user to the Authorized Users of the Share section (For eg. if your integrated system user is TOKU_USER) and note down your **report owner** username (to be shared with us)
            
            ![Screenshot 2025-10-16 at 12.12.42 AM.png](Screenshot_2025-10-16_at_12.12.42_AM.png)
            
        3. Your custom report is ready!
            
            ![Screenshot 2025-10-16 at 12.04.21 AM.png](Screenshot_2025-10-16_at_12.04.21_AM.png)
            
        
- **Establish API connection within Toku**
    1. Login to [Toku](https://tga.app.toku.com/admin/stableCoinPayroll/integrations)
    2. Navigate to Settings → Payroll Integrations
        
        ![Screenshot 2025-10-15 at 5.00.19 PM.png](Screenshot_2025-10-15_at_5.00.19_PM.png)
        
    3. Select Add new Integration
        
        ![Screenshot 2025-12-16 at 11.14.51 AM.png](Screenshot_2025-12-16_at_11.14.51_AM.png)
        
    4. Select Workday
        
        ![Screenshot 2025-10-15 at 5.01.53 PM.png](Screenshot_2025-10-15_at_5.01.53_PM.png)
        
    5. It opens the **Integration purpose** pop-up which asks you whether this integration should be the source of truth for your employees sync. 
        
        ![Screenshot 2025-12-16 at 11.16.37 AM.png](Screenshot_2025-12-16_at_11.16.37_AM.png)
        
    6. Input the following information
        
        ![Screenshot 2025-10-15 at 5.02.20 PM.png](Screenshot_2025-10-15_at_5.02.20_PM.png)
        
        - [Username](Toku%20Workday%20Stablecoin%20Payroll%20Integration%20Guide%20%2028d0b95a751d80698f1ee118a199e6cc.md)
        - [Password](Toku%20Workday%20Stablecoin%20Payroll%20Integration%20Guide%20%2028d0b95a751d80698f1ee118a199e6cc.md)
        - [Tenant endpoint URL](Toku%20Workday%20Stablecoin%20Payroll%20Integration%20Guide%20%2028d0b95a751d80698f1ee118a199e6cc.md)
        - [RAAS Report owner](Toku%20Workday%20Stablecoin%20Payroll%20Integration%20Guide%20%2028d0b95a751d80698f1ee118a199e6cc.md)
        - [Tenant ID](Toku%20Workday%20Stablecoin%20Payroll%20Integration%20Guide%20%2028d0b95a751d80698f1ee118a199e6cc.md)
    7. Configure filters if required. Otherwise, simply click on preview employees. 
        
        ![Screenshot 2025-12-16 at 11.19.21 AM.png](Screenshot_2025-12-16_at_11.19.21_AM.png)
        
    8. You will see a preview of the employee synced from Workday. This means that the connection to your Workday tenant is successful. 
        
        ![Screenshot 2025-12-16 at 11.19.56 AM.png](Screenshot_2025-12-16_at_11.19.56_AM.png)
        
    9. Click “Sync Employees” This process may take some time to create profiles for all employees.
    
    [](data:image/png;base64,)
    

### Where to find login credentials

This is where you can find the Workday Credentials to establish your connection to Toku

- **Username**
    1. Create an integrated system user by searching for “Create Integrated System User” task
    in the search box
    
    ![Screenshot 2025-10-16 at 12.18.33 AM.png](Screenshot_2025-10-16_at_12.18.33_AM.png)
    
    1. Username can be found here
        
        ![Screenshot 2025-12-16 at 11.47.12 AM.png](Screenshot_2025-12-16_at_11.47.12_AM.png)
        
- **Password**
    1. Create an integrated system user by searching for “Create Integrated System User” task
    in the search box
    
    ![Screenshot 2025-10-16 at 12.18.33 AM.png](Screenshot_2025-10-16_at_12.18.33_AM.png)
    
    1.  Password can be found here
        
        ![Screenshot 2025-12-16 at 11.48.32 AM.png](Screenshot_2025-12-16_at_11.48.32_AM.png)
        
- **Tenant ID**
    1. In Workday search “**View API Clients**” 
        
        ![Screenshot 2025-12-16 at 11.50.54 AM.png](Screenshot_2025-12-16_at_11.50.54_AM.png)
        
    2. In the URL of this page you will see the Tenant ID
        
        ![Screenshot 2025-12-16 at 11.52.36 AM.png](Screenshot_2025-12-16_at_11.52.36_AM.png)
        
- **Tenant URL**
    1. In Workday search “**View API Clients**” 
        
        ![Screenshot 2025-12-16 at 11.50.54 AM.png](Screenshot_2025-12-16_at_11.50.54_AM.png)
        
    2. On the Workday REST API Endpoint field you will copy the part after the `https://` and before the `/ccx./….`
        
        ![Screenshot 2025-12-16 at 11.54.25 AM.png](Screenshot_2025-12-16_at_11.54.25_AM.png)
        
- **Report Owner**
    1. In Workday search for “Edit Custom Report” 
        
        ![Screenshot 2025-12-16 at 11.59.02 AM.png](Screenshot_2025-12-16_at_11.59.02_AM.png)
        
    2. Search for the: “TOKU_EMPLOYEE_DEMOGRAPHICS” you created previously
        
        ![Screenshot 2025-12-16 at 12.01.09 PM.png](Screenshot_2025-12-16_at_12.01.09_PM.png)
        
    3. Click “Share”, Then copy the first section before the “/” 
        1. This is your “Report Owner”. 
            1. Note: This can be formatted as an email address or a username depending on your account settings.
                
                ![Screenshot 2025-12-16 at 12.03.16 PM.png](Screenshot_2025-12-16_at_12.03.16_PM.png)
